title: American Prison
author: Shane Bauer
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Prison bars in front, with a single empty cell behind. One bar is RED (the one that's bent — the system breaks). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1300)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif">
    <!-- Cell wall outline behind -->
    <rect x="-500" y="-300" width="1000" height="500" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <!-- The bars: 9 vertical lines -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="6">
      <line x1="-460" y1="-300" x2="-460" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="-340" y1="-300" x2="-340" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="-220" y1="-300" x2="-220" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="-100" y1="-300" x2="-100" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="20" y1="-300" x2="20" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="140" y1="-300" x2="140" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="260" y1="-300" x2="260" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="380" y1="-300" x2="380" y2="200"/>
      <line x1="500" y1="-300" x2="500" y2="200"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The BENT bar in the center — RED, distorted -->
    <path d="M 20 -300 Q 0 -100 40 0 Q 80 100 0 200" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="6" fill="none"/>
    <!-- A whisper 'INMATE' label above -->
    <text x="0" y="-360" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">AN EMPTY CELL · AN INMATE'S YEAR</text>
    <!-- The 4-month tag below the bars -->
    <text x="0" y="260" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">4 MONTHS UNDERCOVER</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A grid of prison bars with a single BENT bar in the center, RED — the system that bends but doesn't break. 320px weight-500 title centered — the title is the indictment.
